entry.title: New: Bill 2993 (Kauaʻi) — On agenda 2026-05-27
entry.content:
A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE TO AMEND ORDINANCE NO. B-2025-905, AS AMENDED, RELATING TO THE OPERATING BUDGET OF THE COUNTY OF KAUA‘I, STATE OF HAWAI‘I, FOR THE FISCAL YEAR JULY 1, 2025 THROUGH JUNE 30, 2026, BY REVISING THE AMOUNTS ESTIMATED IN THE GENERAL FUND (General Liability and Auto Claims, and Health Fund Contribution – $1,445,000.00)

Latest action: On agenda 2026-05-27

View on the council site
